arts.ttl: ‘Interpreted as new message’ – Wolves player thought to have given social media transfer hint
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers’ Gonçalo Guedes is eyeing a move to Valencia. That’s according to Orgullo Biri, who state the 28-year-old aims to be the La Liga side’s big signing in the summer window. The attacking midfielder spent five years at Valencia before moving to Wolves in August 2022. arts.ttl: Friday's Transfer Talk Update: Jonathan David, Matheus Cunha, Victor Lindelof
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: England squad announcement LIVE: Thomas Tuchel set to name players for first World Cup qualifiers
arts.sum: The new England manager will hold a press conference after announcing his first Three Lions squad ahead of World Cup qualifiers against Albania and Latvia at Wembley

arts.ttl: Wolves indicate they’re ready to spend on player – Bid coming at end of season
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are planning a move for Palmeiras youngster Riquelme Fillipi, indicating that they are ready to make a bid for him. That’s according to Nosso Palestra, who say Palmeiras’ standout player in the U-20 season is a target for Wolves this summer. arts.ttl: Newcastle to rival Wolves for transfer of Liverpool forward
arts.sum: Diogo Jota is a summer transfer target for Newcastle United and Wolves with the forward expected to leave Liverpool. Jota has been plagued by fitness injuries across the last three seasons and Liverpool are prepared to offload the Portugal international in the summer.
